name: arxiv_search
description: Search arXiv for academic papers or retrieve specific papers by ID. Returns paper titles, authors, abstracts, categories, and PDF links. Supports arXiv query syntax with field prefixes (ti: for title, au: for author, abs: for abstract, cat: for category, all: for all fields) and boolean operators (AND, OR, ANDNOT). Examples: 'ti:transformer AND cat:cs.LG', 'au:Bengio AND abs:attention'. Common categories: cs.AI (AI), cs.CL (NLP), cs.CV (Computer Vision), cs.LG (Machine Learning), stat.ML (Statistics ML). Use sort_by='date' for recent papers, 'relevance' for keyword searches.

query.description: Search query. Supports plain keywords (e.g., 'large language models') or arXiv query syntax with field prefixes and boolean operators (e.g., 'ti:RLHF AND cat:cs.CL', 'au:"Yann LeCun" AND abs:self-supervised'). Required unless arxiv_ids is provided.

arxiv_ids.description: List of arXiv paper IDs to retrieve directly (e.g., ['2309.10668', '2406.04093']). When provided, query is ignored.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 10, max 200)

sort_by.description: Sort order: 'relevance' for most relevant first, 'date' for newest first

categories.description: arXiv categories to filter by (e.g., ['cs.AI', 'cs.LG', 'cs.CL']). Applied as OR filter on top of the query.
